name: Brad Roach Plumbing
tagline: Owner-operated plumbing in Petaluma — one plumber, every job
seoDescription: Brad Roach Plumbing is an owner-operated plumber in Petaluma, CA serving Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sonoma and Novato

sections.heading: Owner-operated plumbing in Petaluma
sections.subheading: Brad Roach Plumbing is a one-plumber shop in Petaluma — Brad does every job himself, serving Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sonoma and Novato with repairs, remodels and installations at fair, up-front prices
badges: Owner-operated — Brad does every job himself
Serving Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sonoma & Novato

sections.heading: About Brad Roach Plumbing
body: Brad Roach Plumbing is an owner-operated plumbing business in Petaluma — Brad is the one and only plumber, so the person who answers the phone and gives the estimate is the person who does the work. He serves Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sonoma and Novato, and customers consistently describe him as professional, easy to work with and fair on price.

Brad brings more than 25 years in the construction trades, including residential remodeling and a decade of plumbing, plus a California contractor's license, a Colorado Master Plumber's license and an engineering degree from Purdue. The business is licensed and insured under California contractor's license #1087922.
highlights: Owner-operated — Brad does every job himself
Serving Petaluma, Santa Rosa, Sonoma & Novato
